name: Lookalike Domain Detection & Takedown
description: Detects and responds to phishing attacks using lookalike (typosquat) domains that impersonate the organization's brand. Performs WHOIS enrichment on the suspicious domain, checks domain age and registrar, and evaluates similarity to company domains via AI analysis. Confirmed lookalike domains are blocked on the email gateway and web proxy, a domain takedown request is initiated, and the threat intelligence team is notified. Protects against brand impersonation and typosquatting.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: WHOIS
required_integrations.reason: Domain registration details, age, and registrar lookup

data.title: AI Domain Similarity Analysis
data.summary: AI evaluates domain similarity, brand impersonation, and phishing infrastructure

config.custom_instructions: Evaluate lookalike domain: compare suspicious domain to legitimate company domains for typosquatting patterns (character substitution, homoglyphs, extra characters, TLD variations). Assess WHOIS data for recently registered domains with privacy protection. Check for active phishing infrastructure (MX records, web content cloning).
